name: use-scroll-lock
title: useScrollLock
description: Prevent body or element scrolling with reference counting. Multiple locks on the same element stack safely.

docs.description: Prevent body or element scrolling with reference counting. Multiple locks on the same element stack safely.

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: Ref to the element to lock. Defaults to document.body when omitted.

parameters.name: enabled
parameters.description: Whether the scroll lock is active.

returns.description: This hook does not return a value.

notes.title: Reference counting
notes.content: Multiple useScrollLock calls on the same element increment a shared counter. Scrolling is only restored when all locks are released, preventing double-unlock bugs.

notes.title: Standalone
notes.content: useScrollLock does not require KeyboardProvider. It works independently as a copy-paste utility hook.

examples.name: use-scroll-lock-basic
examples.title: Lock body scroll in a modal

parameters.name: enabled
